input.headline: Are you limiting the time you spend online? We’d like to hear from you

raw.headline: Are you limiting the time you spend online? We’d like to hear from you

winner: I'm not *limiting* my time online—I'm just *time-limit-ing* my Wi-Fi bill!

candidates.text: I tried limiting my online time by unplugging my router — now I'm spending all my time trying to figure out how to plug it back in.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 9.0, "reason": "Surprising twist on a common solution, concise and specific with a clear punchline."}

candidates.text: I used to limit my online time for a week—turns out I was just training myself for prison.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a specific, relatable scenario and clever wordplay."}

candidates.text: I tried to limit my time online by physically putting a leash on my router, but now the internet keeps pulling me toward the kitchen.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative metaphor with a surprising twist, concise and specific, uses natural language effectively."}

candidates.text: I asked the internet if it wanted to hear my thoughts on limiting screen time, but it just gave me a blank stare and told me to log off.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and specific metaphor with a touch of personification; concise and naturally funny."}

candidates.text: I'm trying to limit my screen time, but my phone keeps reminding me I have a life — and it's really good at sending notifications.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on screen time with a relatable tech annoyance"}

candidates.text: I'm not *limiting* my time online—I'm just *time-limit-ing* my Wi-Fi bill!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative wordplay with 'time-limit-ing' adds surprise and specificity, aligning well with the headline's theme."}

candidates.text: I'm not limiting my time online — I'm just trying to convince my phone that it's not the center of my universe anymore.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Funny and specific, with a clever twist on the phone's role in our lives."}

candidates.text: I spent exactly 23 minutes and 47 seconds online yesterday—let me know if that's not enough.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Specific, concise, and slightly surprising with the precise time spent online."}

candidates.text: I’m currently limiting my time online so much that I’ve actually started looking at the wall to see if it has any notifications.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on limiting online time, specific and concise with a touch of dry humor."}
